title: Provides immunity from civil liability to certain individuals who acquire or use an automated external defibrillator.
description: Provides immunity from civil liability to certain individuals who acquire or use an automated external defibrillator.

title: "Janet's Law"; requires public and nonpublic schools to have automated external defibrillators and to establish emergency action plans for responding to sudden cardiac events.*
description: "Janet's Law"; requires public and nonpublic schools to have automated external defibrillators and to establish emergency action plans for responding to sudden cardiac events.*

title: Urges boards of education to improve staff and student preparedness for responding to incidents of sudden cardiac arrest.
description: Urges boards of education to improve staff and student preparedness for responding to incidents of sudden cardiac arrest.

title: Urges boards of education to improve staff and student preparedness for responding to incidents of sudden cardiac arrest.
description: Urges boards of education to improve staff and student preparedness for responding to incidents of sudden cardiac arrest.

title: Requires public school students in grades 9 through 12 to receive instruction in cardiopulmonary resuscitation and use of an automated external defibrillator prior to graduation.*
description: Requires public school students in grades 9 through 12 to receive instruction in cardiopulmonary resuscitation and use of an automated external defibrillator prior to graduation.*

title: Extends temporary waiver of certain basic life support services and specialty care transport unit crewmember requirements.
description: Extends temporary waiver of certain basic life support services and specialty care transport unit crewmember requirements.

title: "Sudden Cardiac Arrest Prevention Act"; provides student-athletes, parents, and coaches with information on sudden cardiac arrest and establishes protocol concerning removal-from-play for athletes exhibiting symptoms of sudden cardiac arrest.
description: "Sudden Cardiac Arrest Prevention Act"; provides student-athletes, parents, and coaches with information on sudden cardiac arrest and establishes protocol concerning removal-from-play for athletes exhibiting symptoms of sudden cardiac arrest.

title: Requires annual physical examination of child 19 years of age or younger include certain questions related to cardiac health.*
description: Requires annual physical examination of child 19 years of age or younger include certain questions related to cardiac health.*

title: Temporarily waives certain basic life support services crewmember requirements.
description: Temporarily waives certain basic life support services crewmember requirements.

title: Amends and repeals sections of "Respiratory Care Practitioner Licensing Act."
description: Amends and repeals sections of "Respiratory Care Practitioner Licensing Act."

title: Designates March of each year as "American Red Cross Month."
description: Designates March of each year as "American Red Cross Month."

title: Revises requirements for swimming pools to comply with certain regulations concerning lifeguards, inspections, and circulation systems.
description: Revises requirements for swimming pools to comply with certain regulations concerning lifeguards, inspections, and circulation systems.
